title: Monday.com Service Implementation
excerpt:
Greetings and Salutations! 
We are evaluating Mondy.com Service and would like to understand how Monday.com service is being used in their organization. 
Thanks.

posts.author: GMYoung (Geoff Young)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings and Salutations!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I don’t know that they’ve published anything about that. This forum is mainly for users of monday to provide feedback/questions etc.

Have you started using service yet? Do you have specific questions about it that we could possibly help with?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
